title: Local Structure-Activity Landscape Roughness Predicts QSAR Error and Keeps Conformal Prediction Intervals Valid on Activity Cliffs
description: Analysis pipeline, results, figures, and LaTeX manuscript for a study showing that a per-compound, activity-free measure of local structure-activity landscape roughness predicts where a QSAR model makes large errors, independently of the applicability domain, and that conditioning a conformal predictor on this roughness keeps prediction-interval coverage valid on activity cliffs.

creators.name: Harish, Krishna
creators.affiliation: Elkins High School, Missouri City, Texas, United States
